name: Dinosaur Kids' Hooded Blanket Pink - Pillowfort™
description: The Dinosaur Hooded Blanket from Pillowfort™ will help your child stay warm and cozy in delightful dino-mite style. Made of a faux-fur fabric for toasty comfort, this hooded blanket for kids keeps ‘em wrapped up playfully while they’re reading a book, watching a movie or staying up late with friends. The light pink blanket features a 3D dino head on the hood with orange spikes, pink paws on the front and a tail, making it a part blanket, part costume that your kiddo will love throwing over their head for sweet, anytime cuddling and snuggling. When not in use, this animal hood blanket also serves as a cute decorative accent in their room.
